channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Biomarkers & Precision Medicine
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Biomarkers & Precision Medicine

item.title: The anti-ulcerative potential of Berberine on the rat model of inflammatory bowel disease.
item.description: Journal of molecular histology - Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a global inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) and is a chronic mucosal inflammation of the large intestine. UC is accompanied by the increment in the production and release o...

item.title: Systemic and neurologic autoimmune disorders and antibody seropositivity associated with neurosarcoidosis.
item.description: Journal of neuroimmunology - Comorbid autoimmune disorders and non-specific antibody seropositivity have been commonly reported in prior studies of systemic rheumatologic disorders and neuroimmune diseases. As a disorder witho...

item.title: Rgn couples proliferative EGFR-JAK/STAT signaling and the notch/insulin differentiation-metabolism axis during epithelial repair in Drosophila.
item.description: Insect biochemistry and molecular biology - The Regenerating gene (Rgn) family is implicated in mucosal repair and inflammatory disorders, yet its role in synchronizing intestinal stem cell (ISC) proliferation with stress adaptation remains ...

item.title: Oral Gut-Restricted Targeted Therapy for IBD: A Pipeline Review.
item.description: Drugs - Oral gut-restricted therapies are being explored as a drug delivery strategy for inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), with the aim of achieving therapeutic effects within the intestinal mucosa while m...

item.title: Investigating Handgrip Strength as a Practical Biomarker for Therapeutic Endpoints and Nutritional Status in Patients with Inflammatory Bowel Disease.
item.description: Digestive diseases and sciences - Current biomarkers for inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) often rely on invasive procedures and lack broad availability, limiting their utility in clinical practice. This study aims to investigate th...

item.title: Evaluating the correlation between fecal and serum calprotectin in inflammatory bowel disease.
Chlamydia trachomatis proctitis mimicking an inflammatory bowel disease and hiding human immunodeficiency virus infection.
item.description: European journal of clinical microbiology & infectious diseases : official publication of the European Society of Clinical Microbiology -

item.title: Phage-related symbiosis and antagonism shape gut ecosystem dynamics in Lachnospiraceae and Bacteroidaceae.
item.description: Cell reports - The human gut microbiota is shaped by intricate, yet poorly resolved interactions among bacteria, as well as their relationship to bacteriophages. However, resolving this complex interaction and dy...

item.title: Cordycepin Ameliorates Dextran Sulfate Sodium-Induced Ulcerative Colitis in Mice by Inhibiting IL-6/IL-6R-Mediated p38 MAPK and NF-κB Activation Through Adenosine A2A Receptor Stimulation.
item.description: Drug design, development and therapy - Current ulcerative colitis (UC) therapies often cause adverse effects, and novel treatments are urgently needed. Cordycepin (COR), a bioactive compound from Cordyceps militaris, shows anti-inflamma...
